item.title: ‘While I was in jail, Khan Sir got my brother killed’: Rival tutor’s explosive allegation after bail
item.description: The allegation was made on Monday shortly after Raushan Anand was released on bail in connection with the vandalism of one of Khan Sir’s coaching centres earlier this month. Add

item.title: Khan Sir news: Raushan Anand, a popular teacher, gets bail in Patna coaching controversy, brother Prince Yadav found dead under….
item.description: Raushan Anand, Director of Gyan Bindu Academy, has been granted bail in the Patna coaching centre firing case. He will attend the funeral of his brother Prince Anand, who died in Nepal.
